prompts: /plan "in the apps/plugin project, the marketplace script form fill is not working correctly, we are looking at the url to determine if its a rent or for sale property which is incorrect as FB marketplace uses the same url for both types of listings. We may also be using dynamic class names in our selectors which is an error as they change on every page load. Here is a sample HTML snippet for a for sale listing form in marketplace to verify with : apps/plugin/docs/fb-mp-form.html"

We we got to post the listing to marketplace, if we already have an ai image, ask if we want to create and use a new image or continue with the existing image. Also we are not setting the home for sale or rent listbox correctly, it is still getting set to 'Rent' even though the actual listing is 'For Sale'.
